about.title: About
about.bio1: I'm Rohit Raj — a founding engineer and AI systems architect based in India with 6+ years of experience shipping production software. I specialize in building full-stack applications that combine AI capabilities with robust backend infrastructure. My work spans mobile apps (React Native, Kotlin, Jetpack Compose), AI-powered systems (RAG pipelines, on-device inference, LLM orchestration), and enterprise Java architecture (Spring Boot 3.x, Java 21, Kafka, PostgreSQL).
about.bio2: I've built multi-tenant SaaS platforms, WhatsApp chatbots for healthcare, AI travel planners, and privacy-first financial advisors. Every project ships with real infrastructure — CI/CD pipelines, observability, load testing, and deployment automation. I don't build demos; I build systems that run in production.
about.bio3: Before going independent, I worked on distributed systems and event-driven architectures at scale. I've designed Kafka pipelines processing millions of events, built caching layers that reduced database load by 80%, and architected microservices that handle thousands of concurrent requests.
about.bio4: I document what I build because engineering work is often invisible. This site is a living record of problems I've solved, architecture decisions I've made, and trade-offs I'm still navigating. If you're a founder building an AI product or a startup that needs a technical co-founder who also writes the code — let's talk.
